title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #4, Nami, Loki, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please let this work!! Nami!! ZEUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, this wasn't part of the deal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who said you could put out the fire?!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: GyaAAH!! A Monster!! Watch out, Zeus!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were meant to forsake all this world history crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: what I find most scary A LINDWYRM

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was our last hope to put out these flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must be one of the three "Demons"!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
